5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (lib/server.js). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.lovelace/blob/master/io-package.json).
